symptom_description: Cooling tower basin water temperature rising above `32°C` alarm setpoint (`+100`°C spike). Fan motor stationary (`0 Amps` draw, `460V +/- 1%` at terminals). Note: Vibration and harmonic resonance appear transmitted from CHILL-301.
root_cause: Moisture and corrosive cooling tower mist penetrated motor terminal enclosure, causing insulation breakdown (`0.64 Mega-ohms` resistance) across stator leads.
action_taken: Removed failed cooling tower fan motor using crane, installed severe-duty TEFC replacement motor (`P/N 4948-X`), renewed shaft alignment (`0.009 inch`), and sealed terminal box with RTV.
parts_used: Severe-Duty TEFC Cooling Tower Motor 25HP, Composite Coupling Element, RTV Silicone Sealant

symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker (`175 Amps` overcurrent). Motor frame burning hot (`94`°C) with `marked` smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Cooling fan blade imbalance (`0.007 inch` pitch deviation) destroyed motor output shaft bearings (`0.016 gap`) over `4 years`.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor (`Spec-797`), adjusted fan blade pitch angle (`130 ft-lbs` bolt torque), rebalanced hub assembly, and verified vibration (`< 0.53 in/sec`).
parts_used: TEAO Cooling Tower Motor 40HP, Fan Hub Balancing Kit, Pitch Protractor Tool

symptom_description: Loud localized grinding buzzing/humming sound from cooling tower fan gearbox/motor coupling. Fan blades spinning erratically (`19 Hz` speed fluctuations).
root_cause: Gearbox input shaft lip seal failure (`0.10 inch` gap) allowed moisture ingress, turning lubricating gear oil into an emulsion (`32%` water).
action_taken: Drained emulsified gearbox oil, replaced input shaft seal (`P/N 4875-REV2`), installed new severe-duty motor (`Spec-350`), and refilled with `28 lbs gal` synthetic gear lube.
parts_used: Gearbox Input Seal, Synthetic Gear Oil ISO 220 (5 Gal), Severe-Duty Motor 20HP

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature (`+117`°C) between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight (`118 lbs lbs`) of scale deposits. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from CHILL-301.
root_cause: Solenoid valve on makeup water line stuck open (`0.019 gap` debris), causing constant overflow and dilution of expensive chemical scale inhibitors.
action_taken: Replaced makeup water solenoid valve (`P/N 3748-C`), drained basin, pressure washed `0.26 inch` scale from heater elements, and shock-dosed scale inhibitor (`58 lbs`).
parts_used: Makeup Water Solenoid 1-1/2", Basin Heater Element 5kW, Liquid Scale Inhibitor (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Ops noted slight scale shedding from drift eliminators into cold water basin (`severe` debris accumulation near suction screen). Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from CHILL-301.
root_cause: Improper pH control (`pH > 6.4`) caused rapid precipitation of calcium and magnesium scale across warm PVC fill surfaces (`125`°C).
action_taken: Descaled distribution header and nozzles, vacuumed scale debris (`1.5 lbs`) from cold water basin, and repaired chemical scale inhibitor dosing pump tubing (`P/N 8889-B`).
parts_used: Replacement Fill Media Bundles (2 Packs), Drift Eliminator Sections, Basin Strainer Screen

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature (`+100`°C) between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight (`116 lbs lbs`) of scale deposits.
root_cause: High cycles of concentration (`> 6.0`) operated without adequate bleed-off rate (`307 GPM` deficit) due to stuck automatic conductivity blowdown valve (`Spec-455`).
action_taken: Pressure washed PVC fill pack and drift eliminators with low-pressure wide-fan nozzle (`81 PSI`), repaired conductivity blowdown valve (`Spec-897`), and calibrated chemical dosing (`208 ml/min`).
parts_used: Cooling Tower Spray Nozzles (12-Pack), Conductivity Blowdown Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit

symptom_description: Dry patches (`69%` un-wetted area) visible across top of PVC fill media. Hot water basin overflowing (`284 GPM`) around distribution basin edges.
root_cause: Failure of bypass valve linkage (`125 ft-lbs` broken) dumped full condenser flow (`242 GPM`) over one cell, overwhelming the distribution basin capacity.
action_taken: Repaired bypass valve mechanical linkage (`Spec-262`), manually cleared `74%` blockage from distribution pan, rebalanced cell flow valves, and checked nozzle patterns.
parts_used: Bypass Valve Actuator Arm, Distribution Pan Sweeper Nozzle, Flow Balancing Valve Kit

symptom_description: Severe vibration (`0.53` in/sec) detected on fan deck. Motor cooling fins packed solidly with `0.14 inch` of cooling tower mineral scale.
root_cause: Severe bearing seizure (`44 ft-lbs` lockup) due to water wash-out of grease (`37%` loss) in vertical fan motor lower bearing during heavy monsoon/spray conditions.
action_taken: Swapped out burned cooling tower fan motor with spare severe-duty VFD-rated motor (`P/N 7047-A`), replaced flexible shaft coupling (`P/N 5296-REV2`), and verified fan pitch balance (`0.011 gap`).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Tower Induction Motor, Flexible Drive Shaft Coupling, Motor Rain Canopy

symptom_description: Cooling tower blowdown line restricted (`35%` flow capacity) by hard calcium carbonate scaling. Basin conductivity reading `26 Hz uS/cm` (very high).
root_cause: Failure of chemical scale inhibitor/dispersant dosing pump (`460V` power loss) allowed calcium carbonate hardness to exceed saturation index (`LSI > +1.5`).
action_taken: Circulated bio-dispersant and mild descaling agent (`P/N 6084-REV2`) through tower loop for `27225` hours, flushed cold water basin, and serviced bleed-off solenoid (`P/N 1541-A`).
parts_used: Cooling Tower Descaling Chemical (15 Gal), Bio-Dispersant (5 Gal), Replacement PVC Fill Block Sections (4 Bundles)

symptom_description: VFD indicating ground fault trip on cooling tower fan feed. Megger test shows dead short (`0.12 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) on motor leads.
root_cause: Severe bearing seizure (`222 in-lbs` lockup) due to water wash-out of grease (`92%` loss) in vertical fan motor lower bearing during heavy monsoon/spray conditions.
action_taken: Swapped out burned cooling tower fan motor with spare severe-duty VFD-rated motor (`P/N 8859-B`), replaced flexible shaft coupling (`P/N 7188-C`), and verified fan pitch balance (`0.008 gap`).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Tower Induction Motor, Flexible Drive Shaft Coupling, Motor Rain Canopy

symptom_description: Multiple distribution target nozzles completely plugged (`40%` blocked) with debris, causing heavy localized channeling and splashing inside tower.
root_cause: Accumulation of wind-blown leaves, plastic wrappers, and organic debris (`6.4 lbs`) in hot water distribution basin plugging nozzle orifices (`0.009 gap`).
action_taken: Removed hot water basin covers, manually cleared leaves/debris (`4.1 lbs`) from all distribution nozzles, pressure washed basin (`61 PSI`), and chlorinated loop.
parts_used: Polypropylene Target Spray Nozzles (15-Pack), Basin Cover Fasteners

symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`+121`°C higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.61` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header.
root_cause: Structural collapse of fiberglass distribution header pipe (`1.0 ft` section) due to winter freeze damage, dumping water straight into basin.
action_taken: Replaced shattered fiberglass header section (`Spec-168`), installed new target nozzles (`P/N 9202-REV2`), flushed system of fiberglass shards (`6.3 lbs`), and verified distribution pattern.
parts_used: FRP Header Pipe Section (10ft), Flange Gasket Kit, Target Spray Nozzle Set (12x)

symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`+95`°C higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.22` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on CHILL-301.
root_cause: Severe algae and biological slime mats (`0.14 inch` thick) broke loose from distribution header piping and lodged inside target spray nozzles.
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned 36 target spray nozzles (`P/N 4082-C`), flushed main distribution header piping, installed new coarse inlet strainer baskets (`Spec-349`), and shock-chlorinated tower.
parts_used: Replacement Distribution Nozzles (24-Pack), Coarse Mesh Inlet Strainer Basket, Shock Biocide (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Heavy white/brown mineral scale (`0.08 inch` crust thickness) visible on PVC fill media and drift eliminators during weekly inspection.
root_cause: High cycles of concentration (`> 6.0`) operated without adequate bleed-off rate (`728 GPM` deficit) due to stuck automatic conductivity blowdown valve (`Spec-911`).
action_taken: Pressure washed PVC fill pack and drift eliminators with low-pressure wide-fan nozzle (`19 PSI`), repaired conductivity blowdown valve (`P/N 6539-B`), and calibrated chemical dosing (`265 ml/min`).
parts_used: Cooling Tower Spray Nozzles (12-Pack), Conductivity Blowdown Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit

symptom_description: Ops noted heavy scale shedding from drift eliminators into cold water basin (`marked` debris accumulation near suction screen).
root_cause: Conductivity controller probe fouling (`0.14 inch` coating) caused false low readings (`26 Hz uS/cm`), preventing automatic blowdown initiation.
action_taken: Removed and acid-cleaned conductivity controller probe (`Spec-753`), verified calibration (`48 Hz uS/cm`), manually triggered blowdown (`791 GPM`), and flushed basin.
parts_used: Conductivity Probe Cleaning Solution, Blowdown Valve Rebuild Kit, Calibration Fluid
